name: Aprea Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Aprea Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage precision medicine oncology company focused on discovery and development of targeted therapies for patients with biomarker-defined cancers. The company develops small molecule inhibitors designed to exploit genetic mutations in cancer to achieve synthetic lethality. Its lead product candidates are APR-1051, a WEE1 inhibitor, and ATRN-119, an ATR inhibitor, both in clinical trials.
sellsTo: solid tumors with specific genetic mutations

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage precision medicine oncology company focused on the discovery and development of targeted therapies for patients with biomarker-defined cancers.

catalysts.event: Completion of dose-escalation for APR-1051 Phase 1 study ACESOT-1051
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the dose-escalation part of this study in the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Availability of additional open-label safety/efficacy data for APR-1051
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate additional open-label safety/efficacy data to be available in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: APR-1602 ready to enter IND-enabling studies
catalysts.sentence: We also have an early-stage program, APR-1602, a macrocyclic DYRK1A/B inhibitor, that will be ready to enter IND-enabling studies in the fourth quarter of 2026.
